title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, discusses his bootstrapping playbook that took the company to $10M ARR in 117 days to $1M ARR. The interview covers growth strategies including reducing churn, pricing experiments, outbound sales, and decision-making frameworks for early-stage founders.
